evidently.project.s3destination.CfnAbout: If the project stores evaluation events in an Amazon S3 bucket, this structure stores the bucket name and bucket prefix.

evidently.project.s3destination.BucketNa.Description: The name of the bucket in which Evidently stores evaluation events.

evidently.project.s3destination.Prefix.Description: The bucket prefix in which Evidently stores evaluation events.
